name_cn:
Latest FENDI Baguette chain collection
The Baguette bag features timeless classic elements that never go out of style, exuding enduring fashion charm. It includes the most popular practical accessory in the current market—the sliding chain, meeting daily needs while combining functionality and a modern attitude 😈
Dimensions 24x14x7cm
